description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rocker/tidyverse Docker image with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add an installAndRender job that runs only on the master branch, executes apt-get update, apt-get install -y libxslt1-dev, R -e 'devtools::install_github("ropenscilabs/tinkr")', Rscript -e 'install.packages(c("lme4", "sticky", "here", "tidyverse", "roxygen2", "car", "stargazer", "rmarkdown", "knitr", "RColorBrewer", "wesanderson", "hexbin", "MASS", "broom.mixed", "kableExtra"))', make install, Rscript -e 'install.packages("pkgdown")', and make pkgdown, and stores the docs directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also runs only on master, moves the docs directory to public with mv docs public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure both jobs use the specified image and the pipeline triggers only on the master branch.
